task_objective: Fashion Line Art to Garment Design & 6-View Premium Presentation - Generate garment design from Figure 1 line art with Figure 2 inspiration aesthetics, presented in a premium fashion layout with Figure 2 inspiration at center, 2 views on top, 1 on each side, and brand campaign at bottom, emphasizing the creative transformation from inspiration to final design

structural_reference.focus: EXACT garment structural framework - proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, waistline, and overall garment length - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structural_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for garment design generation

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color system, fabric texture, pattern or detailing, and overall style tone - applied exclusively to garment structure
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic elements to be applied onto the garment structure from Figure 1

workflow.role: Professional Fashion Designer & Premium Image Editing Specialist

steps.step_1_inspiration_analysis: Comprehensive analysis of Figure 2 inspiration: extract core visual features including colors, textures, mood, pattern elements, fabric characteristics, and artistic aesthetics. Generate artistic description, bullet-point analysis, and mood keywords. Identify dominant color palette, pattern rhythm, fabric properties, and overall style direction.
steps.step_2_sketch_design_generation: Generate garment sketch design based on Figure 1 line art structure with inspiration aesthetics from Figure 2. STRICTLY preserve Figure 1's garment proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, waistline, and overall garment length. Apply inspiration-derived color system, fabric texture, and style elements onto the locked structure with pixel-level precision. No structural deviation allowed.
steps.step_3_render_generation: Generate high-fidelity rendered garment effect image from the sketch design with realistic fabric rendering: accurate material simulation (silk sheen, cotton matte, wool texture, linen weave), physically-based fabric draping following gravity and body curvature, natural wrinkle patterns at stress points, and coherent lighting interaction.
steps.step_4_multi_view_presentation: Generate presentation views using selected model type with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone. Ensure garment-to-body fit is physically accurate with natural fabric-body interaction, proper tension at seams and stress points, and realistic shadow casting between garment and body. Maintain absolute garment design consistency and model identity across all views.
steps.step_5_campaign_generation: Generate brand campaign image with model wearing the garment in a dynamic editorial pose within a stylish setting matching Figure 2 inspiration mood. High-end fashion photography style with dramatic lighting and composition.
steps.step_6_premium_layout_assembly: Assemble the 6-view premium fashion layout with Figure 2 inspiration at center, sketch and render on top, side view on left, detail closeup on right, brand campaign at bottom, connected with elegant visual elements indicating the creative transformation journey

outputs.center_inspiration: Figure 2 Inspiration at center - Original inspiration image prominently displayed at the center of the layout, with premium framing and subtle glow effect. Labeled "灵感溯源 INSPIRATION SOURCE". Display AI-generated artistic description, key visual feature analysis bullet points, and mood keywords.
outputs.top_left: Sketch Design - Positioned top-left of center inspiration. Garment sketch design based on Figure 1 structure with Figure 2 aesthetics applied, clean background, clearly revealing design outline and structure. Labeled "草图设计 SKETCH".
outputs.top_right: Rendered Effect - Positioned top-right of center inspiration. High-fidelity rendered garment design with realistic fabrics, textures, gloss, and lighting. Labeled "服装渲染 GARMENT RENDER".
outputs.left_view: Side Profile - Positioned left of center inspiration. Model wearing the garment in side profile (using selected model_type), emphasizing silhouette continuity, waistline, sleeve drape, and overall garment presentation. Labeled "侧面效果 SIDE".
outputs.right_view: Detail Closeup - Positioned right of center inspiration. Dutch angle close-up perspective of the collar and garment interaction area, showcasing collar construction, button or closure details, fabric texture, and stitching craftsmanship. Labeled "细节特写 DETAIL".
outputs.bottom_campaign: Brand Campaign - Positioned below center inspiration. Model wearing the garment in a dynamic editorial pose within a stylish setting matching Figure 2 inspiration mood. High-end fashion photography with dramatic lighting. Labeled "品牌时尚 FASHION CAMPAIGN".

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of Figure 1 garment structural framework across all generated views - no structural deviation
Aesthetic elements from Figure 2 applied exclusively to the garment structure with pixel-level precision
Garment design in all wear views and campaign image MUST be 100% identical to top_right rendered effect with seamless edge blending between garment and body with no visible artifacts
Realistic fabric rendering: fabric-specific sheen, texture, and light interaction (silk, cotton, wool, linen)
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African female model) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone, 100% consistent across all wear views
Coherent lighting and shadow: garment shadows cast on body, ambient occlusion at fabric folds, consistent light direction across all views

Premium atmosphere: color system extracted from Figure 2 with multi-layered gradient background matching inspiration mood, luminous glow around center inspiration, cinematic vignette at edges, unified color grading across all views with coherent warm/cool tone and matching saturation, luxury white space with premium framing and subtle shadow/glow effects, high-end fashion photography with editorial-level retouching

AI copywriting: series title (3-4 char Chinese + UPPERCASE English subtitle + poetic Chinese tagline), inspiration analysis (60-word description + 2-4 visual feature bullets + 3-5 mood keywords), garment spec (2-4 fabric materials + 2-4 craftsmanship techniques + style positioning), DNA mapping (3-5 icon-annotated inspiration-to-design element pairs)

All in-image copywriting must be Chinese-primary with English-secondary, elegant premium typography (serif for luxury, sans-serif for modern, script for feminine), with subtle decorative icons matching inspiration theme (e.g., silk ribbon for elegance, leaf for nature, gemstone for luxury, wave for fluid)
